g.text: ENV: PROD | REGION: ap-southeast-1 | VERSION: v1.0.0

svg.text: PSX EOD CSV → Python Ingestor → Manifest Authority → DuckDB → dbt → FastAPI → Dashboard

g.text: detect → ingest → init_schema → dbt run → DQ
F-019: amendment detection (existing key + new hash)
F-024: computed/v{N}/ versioning on corp action
memory_limit: 2 GB (SET at every connection open)
schema init: initialize_schema() at pipeline start
F-023: VWAP/Amihud stored ONLY at daily grain
SUM(VWAP) across rows is schema-level impossible
unlimited concurrent readers · no write lock
PSX file completeness unverifiable (no expected symbol count)
SARIMA convergence vs PSX liquidity profile: accepted
manifest_key: (symbol, session_date) · recovery: rebuild_manifest_from_raw() — no data loss
memory_limit: 2 GB · applied at every connection open via SET statement
date_range_max: 90 days · configured via PSX_MAX_DATE_RANGE_DAYS env var
